zh.lifeSummary: 當John Elyot於1350年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 格曼斯 索迪 本 福利茲時，他的父親John Aylett of Elyot30歲，母親Mary Ann Mumford30歲。他和Agnes Wogan至少有2個兒子。他去世於1410年在英國英格蘭戴文易亞斯特 布德利享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文易亞斯特 布德利。

nameMeanings.name: Elyot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Elliott  .

History: Andrew Eliot, a shoemaker of East Coker, Somerset, England, who emigrated to Boston, MA, in 1670, was the founder of a distinguished American family which included the poet T. S. Eliot (1888–1965), who was born in St. Louis, MO. The earliest Eliot recorded in North America was John Eliot (1604–90), a Puritan missionary known as the ‘Indian Apostle’, who was born in Hertfordshire and sailed to Boston in 1631. He later settled in Roxbury, MA.

variants.name: Elliott
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Eliot, a pet form of the Old Testament name Elijah, rendered in Greek as Ēlias and in Old French as Élie + the diminutive suffix -ot; compare Ellis . The name Aylett may in some cases also have been confused with or absorbed into Elliott.

Scottish (of Breton origin): perhaps, as some members of the Elliott clan believe, a Scottish variant of the Breton surname Elleouet, a habitational name from one of the hamlets named Allegot in Finistère.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Elyot was born in 1350, in St Germans Society of Friends, Cornwall, England, his father, John Aylett of Elyot, was 30 and his mother, Mary Ann Mumford, was 30. He had at least 2 sons with Agnes Wogan. He died in 1410, in East Budleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in East Budleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Agnes Wogan. Il est décédé en 1410, à East Budleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à East Budleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er starb 1410 im Alter von 60 Jahren in East Budleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in East Budleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.Port Eliot, Saint Germans, Cornwall, Eng: イギリスコルンワルスト ジャーマンス ソシエトイ オフ フリーンズ
ja.lifeSummary: John Elyotが1350年にイギリスコルンワルスト ジャーマンス ソシエトイ オフ フリーンズで生まれた時，父John Aylett of Elyotは30歳，母Mary Ann Mumfordは30歳であった。彼はAgnes Woganとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1410年にイギリスイギリスデボンエアスト ブドレイグで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンエアスト ブドレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.Port Eliot, Saint Germans, Cornwall, Eng: 영국 코른월 스트 그먼스 소시티 프 프리드즈
ko.lifeSummary: John Elyot(이)가 1350년 영국 코른월 스트 그먼스 소시티 프 프리드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Aylett of Elyot(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ann Mumford(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Agnes Wogan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이스트 버들리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이스트 버들리에 묻혔다.

ru.Port Eliot, Saint Germans, Cornwall, Eng: ст джирманс сосиеты оф фриендс, корнвалл, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Elyot родился в 1350 г. в местности ст джирманс сосиеты оф фриендс, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John Aylett of Elyot было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ann Mumford, 30. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Agnes Wogan. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности эаст будлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст будлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
